name: Biruk Adera
title: Senior Software Engineer
tagline: Architecting high-performance backend systems and leading engineering teams across fintech, edtech, and SaaS
bio: I'm a Senior Software Engineer with extensive experience designing and shipping backend systems that scale. I've built ERP platforms on Azure, real-time financial data pipelines on AWS, ad-scheduling microservices, ride-hailing backends (in collaboration with Honda), and agricultural platforms serving farmers in low-connectivity regions. My work spans full-time roles, long-term freelance engagements, and 60+ contracts on Upwork — where I hold Top Rated Plus status with a 100% job success rate across $400K+ in delivered projects. I'm most effective at the intersection of backend architecture, cloud infrastructure, and team leadership.
